title: Crispy Shulkers
description: This mod lets you insta-kill shulkers and harvest their insides for food.
body:
This mod is all about eating shulkers!

How to prepare shulker insides yourself?
-  Step 1:
-  Hit a shulker and take its head.
  Step 2:
-  Shear off the eyes unless you want poisoned. 
    (You get hungry while shearing off the eyes so you decide to eat the shears.)
  Step 3:
-  Cook the shulker in a furnace or smoker.
  Step 4:
-  You now have the new best saturation food source in the game... but it is hideous and gives you some side effects..
 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Dont actually use this in your playthrough this is a joke.
This was made with mcreator btw
</details>
